hypothesis._variant_note: v2 family member 3 of 5 (H3: quality + flow confirmation). Most aggressive composite change: 5 components (GARP x 3 with reduced val_bp weight + comp_defensive + flow_net_inflow_20d). Tests whether multi-source confirmation (fundamentals + defensive style + capital flow) reduces value-trap exposure and DD without breaking turnover floor.
hypothesis.thesis_statement: A 5-leg composite combining 3-leg GARP fundamentals (with val_bp_industry_rel down-weighted to 0.5) plus comp_defensive (positive defensive composite, w=1) plus flow_net_inflow_20d (capital-flow confirmation, w=0.5) at TopK=100/rebalance=20d delivers cost-adjusted excess return vs CSI500 with max_drawdown<=32% and annual_turnover<=3.5x.
hypothesis.mechanism: GARP fundamentals identify cheap-but-improving names; comp_defensive (B-grade, rank_icir=+0.30, ls_sharpe=+1.23) tilts toward low-leverage low-vol profile that reduces drawdown depth; flow_net_inflow_20d (B-grade, rank_icir=+0.38, ls_sharpe=+4.25, ls_max_dd=0.57) provides capital-flow confirmation that prunes value-trap names with weak institutional support. The val_bp leg is down-weighted because it overlaps in spirit with comp_defensive (both lean defensive-style), preventing double-counting.

source.title: Growth-strategy v2 variant family — H3 quality+flow confirmation

pre_registered_concerns.most_likely_failure_mode: Composite-level overfitting: a 5-leg composite has more degrees of freedom than the 3-leg baseline. Its IS rank_icir may exceed the baseline 0.466 superficially while its OOS metrics shrink more aggressively. Symptom: IS rank_icir > 0.50 with deflated_sharpe > 1.2, then OOS Sharpe drops to <0.5. Mitigation: per-component IC decomposition is required during gate review; if any single leg dominates with weight-product > 50% of composite IC, the composite is brittle and must be rejected even if it passes the floor.
pre_registered_concerns.weakest_assumption: comp_defensive and val_bp_industry_rel may correlate strongly cross-sectionally (both lean toward defensive characteristics). Down-weighting val_bp to 0.5 is an attempt to manage this overlap but is unverified at this weight. If correlation > 0.6, the composite is effectively 4-leg with double-weighted defensive.
pre_registered_concerns.what_would_falsify_this: IS gate rejection on (annual_turnover > 4.0) — flow_net_inflow_20d is a 20d-horizon factor that may force rebalances at the 20d cadence even when GARP quarterly fundamentals are stable. IS gate rejection on (max_drawdown > 0.32) means defensive ballast is insufficient even with capital-flow confirmation; H5's universe filter is the next step.
pre_registered_concerns.priors_on_cost_sensitivity: Two short-horizon legs (flow_net_inflow_20d at horizon ~20d) interact with 20d rebalance cadence; turnover may push to 4-5x range. cost_adjusted_sharpe expected ~0.6-0.8 if base rank_ic holds at 0.035.

prescription._note: v2 H3 quality+flow: 5 components. GARP x 3 with val_bp downweighted to 0.5; comp_defensive w=1.0; flow_net_inflow_20d w=0.5. TopK=100, rebalance=20d, max_pos=0.015.
